compliance.assurance_rationale: EU CRA Art.13 Obligations of manufacturers — secret-exposure detection in source code evidences the secure-development obligation for digital products.
HITRUST CSF v11 09.aa Audit logging — exposure detections feed the audit-logging-and-response workflow.
SAMA CSF v1.0 3.3.5 Security monitoring — SCM-secret detection is treated as an emerging security-monitoring input under SAMA.
